title: Feskitt Bobb

'''Feskitt Bobb''' was a [[Mandallian Giant]] who operated as a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Originally a member of [[Tobbi Dala]] and [[Fenn Shysa]]'s covert [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|training program]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]], Bobb washed out of the program with the [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Alfreda Goot]]. Bobb acquired a set of [[Mandalorian Supercommando|supercommando]] [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|armor]] and became a freelance [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]-for-hire.

His most notable accomplishment was the capture of the serial [[Death/Legends|killer]] [[Vydel Dir'Nul|Kardem]]. Bobb's career was ended on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Goratak III]] when he was contracted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] to assist in the [[Mission to Goratak III|recovery]] of an [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]]. An [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] agent named [[Jodo Kast]] killed Bobb, believing at the [[Time/Legends|time]] that he was the notorious [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]].

==Biography==
[[File:Alfreda_Goot-HS.jpg|thumb|left|180px|Feskitt Bobb washed out of a Mandalore training program alongside Alfreda Goot (pictured).]]
Feskitt Bobb was a [[Mandallian Giant]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] who, along with the [[Togorian/Legends|Togorian]] [[Alfreda Goot]], washed out of the elite [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|police]] [[Mandalorian Protectors (Spar)|training program]] established on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] by [[Tobbi Dala]] and [[Fenn Shysa]]. Despite this, Bobb assembled a set of [[Mandalorian Supercommando|supercommando]] [[Mandalorian armor/Legends|armor]] and became a [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]]<ref name="HM" /> and [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]],<ref name="CG" /> undertaking special assignments on behalf of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Competent and ruthless, he had no trouble using [[Torture/Legends|torture]] methods such as [[The Burning/Legends|the Burning]] during his hunts and even carried illegal [[Disruptor/Legends|disruptors]]. Bobb's most high-profile capture was the serial [[Death/Legends|killer]] [[Vydel Dir'Nul|Kardem]],<ref name="HM" /> who was, in reality, the fallen [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] Vydel Dir'Nul.<ref name="DJ">{{Tales|17|Dark Journey (comic story)}}</ref>

Sometime prior to [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]],<ref name="Date" /> [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] contracted Bobb and [[Charlie Company|nine other]] [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunters to assist in the [[Mission to Goratak III|recovery]] of an [[I2-CG droid/Legends|I2-CG]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] that had ejected from a [[Tech 4 PDV|Plexus Droid Vessel]] over the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Goratak III]] while carrying information on an [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] manufacturing operation on the planet [[Tar Morden]]. The bounty hunters were used to augment the Imperial force of two [[cold assault stormtrooper]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]]. The Alliance sent in a force of three squads to obtain the droid, assisted by the ex-[[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] [[Grindol Maal]] and [[Wuwuhuul]], a [[Thuwisten]]<ref name="CG" /> of the [[Tyia]].<ref name="CG-2">{{WEGCite|story=The Crystal Forest of Goratak|book=Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|reprint=1}}</ref> The two forces clashed for control of the droid.<ref name="CG" /> During the engagement, Bobb was killed by [[Alliance Special Operations/Legends|Alliance Special Operations]] [[Soldier/Legends|soldier]] [[Jodo Kast]], who believed that Bobb was the notorious bounty hunter [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]].<ref name="HM" /> After killing Bobb, Kast realized that anyone mistaken for Fett would have a tremendous advantage as a freelance bounty hunter; Kast took Bobb's [[Armor/Legends|armor]] and defected from the Alliance to begin his own bounty hunting career.<ref name="SV">[[Scum and Villainy (sourcebook)|''Scum and Villainy'']]</ref>

==Personality and traits==
Feskitt Bobb had [[Color/Legends|bluish-green]] skin and white [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. He was an accomplished bounty hunter with a ruthless streak that led him to pursue torture as an effective means of capturing his prey. He was able to capture the serial killer known as Kardem,<ref name="HM" /> despite the target's aptitude with [[The Force/Legends|the Force]].<ref name="DJ" /> Bobb's personality was ultimately deemed to not be conducive to a role within the Mandalorian Protectors, leading to him being washed out of the training program.<ref name="HM" />

==Skills and abilities==
Bobb was trained in a variety of combat skills, including the use of [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]], [[blaster artillery]], and [[Grenade/Legends|grenades]]. He was also skilled in both [[Melee weapon/Legends|melee]] and [[Unarmed combat/Legends|unarmed combat]]. Bobb was trained in survival techniques and the operation of [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles, as well as the application of demolitions.<ref name="CG-2" />

==Equipment==
Bobb wore Mandalorian armor with red markings,<ref name="HM" /> and he armed himself with a [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifle]], [[Blaster pistol/Legends|blaster pistol]], [[Grenade launcher/Legends|grenade launcher]],<ref name="CG" /> disruptors, and [[Wrist rocket/Legends|wrist rockets]].<ref name="HM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Feskitt Bobb first appeared in "[[The Crystal Forest of Goratak]]," an adventure scenario published in the [[Star Wars Miniatures Battles (first edition)|first edition]] of ''[[Star Wars Miniatures Battles]]'', released in [[1991]].<ref name="CG" />
